---
title: "Three Bears with Gravel Loop"
---
**32.5 miles<br> 3,171.6 ft elevation gain**  

## Map
<iframe
  src="../data/routes/three_bears/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
></iframe>

## Data
<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>25.53</td>
      <td>79.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>3.46</td>
      <td>11.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.95</td>
      <td>6.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>1.36</td>
      <td>4.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.20</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>
